name: Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
Note: To make this fruit sweetener, mix together 1/3 cup frozen apple juice concentrate (thawed) and 1/3 cup granulated fructose.
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Prepare the pastry and line a 9-inch pan with crust. Crimp the edge of the crust. Pour all ingredients into the prepared crust in order, mixing them thoroughly by beating for two minutes on low using an electric mixer. Place the mixture in the crust and bake for 30-40 minutes or until set. Allow to cool slightly before serving.
Nutritional Analysis:
Yield:serves 8
Per serving:
230 Calories; 8g Fat; 31g Carbohydrate;
8g Protein; 104mg Cholesterol; 267mg Sodium;
Exchanges:1 fruit; 1 bread; 1-1/2 fat exchange
